title: Understanding Borneo Through Trusted Data
content: Borneo Tracker brings environmental, social and sustainability indicators together in one clear and accessible platform. We support public awareness, regional monitoring and evidence-informed decisions by making Borneo's sustainability data easier to explore, compare and understand. Forest cover, deforestation, air quality, water quality and fire hotspots. Poverty, employment, education, healthcare and clean water access. Regional performance across priority Sustainable Development Goals. Every indicator includes its source and update information so users can understand where the data comes from and how it supports the dashboard. Borneo Tracker supports awareness and monitoring. For emergencies, always contact the relevant official emergency services.
